Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jai Long]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long is a sacred artist who believes most are too consumed with gaining strength to consider how to use it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long and Kral have reached the same stage of advancement in the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long is a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long wears red cloth wrapped tightly around his head, leaving only his eyes visible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long's laugh sounds like the cackling of a deranged murderer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long's Goldsign is a face he does not like.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long uses a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long has an affinity for the Path of the Stellar Spear that is second only to his clan's Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — At thirteen years old, Jai Long reached the peak of Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long's Goldsign is a face that is scarred and twisted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Long wears ordinary dark robes and long strips of red cloth wrapped around his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Long's head wraps are covered in script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Long's combat stance is described as crouching like a tiger about to pounce.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long is an exile from the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long has a foundation that could potentially reach Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long wears a scripted mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long was cast out of the Jai clan because of his Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long is an attendant of the Sandviper sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long observed the cages of captured miners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long uses Stellar Spear madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long has the physical strength of an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Jai Long is a tall spearman wearing a mask of red cloth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Jai Long follows the Path of the Stellar Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Jai Long is the de facto leader of the Sandviper sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long is a member of the Jai clan who emerged from the door with a red-wrapped head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long is a character.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is a member of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is predicted to potentially tear through the halls of the Jai clan with a pure white spear that drinks the power of slain Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a low probability that Jai Long will be killed by a Jai Lowgold during battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a low probability that Jai Long will eventually die in isolation after his sister persuades him to end his crusade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a high probability that Jai Long will engage in an upcoming duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a high probability that Jai Long will be sabotaged by attackers before his duel, causing him to fight weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — There is a high probability that Jai Long will be suppressed by the Jai Patriarch using a wound inflicted by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is predicted to take revenge on behalf of Kral.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin had faced Jai Long before her current state.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Long is a powerful individual who outclassed Yerin in power.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Jai Long is an opponent Lindon envisions fighting in an arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Jai Long is capable of clearing the training course with his eyes closed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Jai Long is an heir to a vassal sect of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Jai Long is currently on the run from his clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Long possesses spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Long uses the Serpent's Shadow technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Long uses the Flowing Starlight technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Long is a character who was struggling and half-blind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Long was leaving bleeding footprints in the grass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long is a former Jai clan heir and is considered dangerous even for a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Long rides a bat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long is a practitioner of sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long deviated from his Path by bonding a Remnant with different aspects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long is in Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long's original plan was to kill two Jai Lowgolds and capture their Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long is a person Lindon seeks to defeat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Jai Long is mentioned by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon has an obligation to Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Jai Long is a specter looming over the Trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Trial is intended as a first step toward defeating Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin believes Lindon will be killed by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Jai Long is involved in a rebellion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Jai Long has broken through to Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Jai Long is the sibling of the clan guardian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long wears red cloth bandages over his face that are filled with flowing script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long's eyes glitter in the center of his mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long is a character who can crash into Yerin's technique with his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is a sword artist who can fight through the violent storm of Yerin's advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is a stranger to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long uses the Ancestor’s Spear to gain power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long uses Star’s Edge techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long has an inheritance from a serpentine Remnant that reshapes his jaw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long was unsure if he was up to a specific task.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Long is Jai Chen's brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Long is one of the few people who talks to Jai Chen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Long is a young man who has a rivalry with Lindon.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon has an approaching duel with Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Eithan mentions Jai Long as an opponent to defeat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Jai Long is a Blackflame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon is at the mercy of Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long possesses Truegold madra in his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long has blue, shark-like fangs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long cast the Ancestor's Spear aside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long scooped up Jai Chen and backed away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long's attacks create serpent outlines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long is under an oath to serve the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long is a character who emitted a twisting white light from his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long cries out for help for his sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long was previously targeted by a Snare binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan used Jai Long as motivation for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long was the one who actually removed Lindon's arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long is a figure whose victory would affect the reputation of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long is considered to be close to Eithan's level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long uses a white-edged spear to fight blood-creatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long has a sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long uses a cycling technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long departed without further words.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Jai Long went from Highgold to Truegold using the Ancestor's Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Jai Long is a boy Lindon has fought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Jai Long is a character who defeated Lindon in a duel.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon prepared to fight Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Long was involved in a battle where Yerin advanced to Highgold.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Jai Long is a lean man wearing simple brown clothes and carrying an ornate spear with a blue haft.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Long is Kelsa's ally who promised to get her parents out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long spoke coldly to the guardians of the Fallen Leaf School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long's madra is white and appears on his skin like shining serpentine tattoos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Jai Long is an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Jai Long has no interest in the sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Jai Long is a character who interacts with Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long was not present on the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long uses soulfire-enhanced madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long is exhausted and weak in spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Long uses the halves of a broken spear as weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen carried Jai Long on a stretcher atop a hovering construct.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long meditates on the nature of his madra every morning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long is a peak Truegold with soulfire in his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long is a member of the Sect of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is advancing to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long has soulfire in his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Jai Long is a member of the squad that was battered and burned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Jai Long uses an Enforcer technique.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long no longer wears a mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long has a red strip of scripted cloth wrapped around his forehead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long's spirit is much stronger than before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long has blue light leaking from the inside of his mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long wears a Twin Star emblem on his outer robe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Long is addressed as 'honored Sage' by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Long's body was forged in soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Long died after being targeted by earth eruptions and madra of every aspect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Long's Remnant was blue-white and serpentine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Long is missing from the camp.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long was killed by the attack of a Dreadgod.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
